content.text: 基于文件的缓存系统，支持同步和异步操作。File-based caching system that supports both synchronous and asynchronous operations with automatic method wrapping and persistent storage.
Computes the cache directory path based on a base directory
Computed cache directory path (.ncu/cache subdirectory)

text.comment: Base directory path

Description:

Computes the cache directory path based on a base directory

Returns:

Computed cache directory path (.ncu/cache subdirectory)

Example:
const cache = new Cache('./temp');
const cacheDir = cache.computeCacheDir('./project');
console.log(cacheDir); // './project/.ncu/cache'

content.text: Disables caching - all cache operations will be bypassed
enable
- Re-enable caching

text.comment:
Description:

Disables caching - all cache operations will be bypassed

Example:
const cache = new Cache('./cache');
cache.disable();

// These operations will be bypassed
cache.write('key', '.json', data); // No-op
const result = cache.get('key', '.json'); // Returns undefined
See:

enable - Re-enable caching

content.text: Enables caching - cache operations will function normally
disable
- Disable caching

text.comment:
Description:

Enables caching - cache operations will function normally

Example:
const cache = new Cache('./cache');
cache.enable();

// Cache operations now work
cache.write('config', '.json', { theme: 'dark' });
const config = cache.get('config', '.json'); // Returns cached data
See:

disable - Disable caching

content.text: Retrieves cached data from disk
Cached data (parsed JSON for .json files, string for others), or undefined if not found

text.comment: Cache key identifier

summary.text: File extension ('.json' for JSON parsing, others as text)

text.comment: File extension ('.json' for JSON parsing, others as text)

Description:

Retrieves cached data from disk

Returns:

Cached data (parsed JSON for .json files, string for others), or undefined if not found

Example:
// Get JSON data
const userData = cache.get('user-123', '.json');
console.log(userData?.name); // 'John'
Example:
// Get text data
const htmlTemplate = cache.get('email-template', '.html');
console.log(typeof htmlTemplate); // 'string'
Example:
// Handle missing cache
const config = cache.get('app-config', '.json');
if (!config) {
  console.log('Cache miss - loading from source');
}

content.text: Constructs the full file path for a cache entry
Complete file path for the cache entry

text.comment: Cache key identifier
File extension (e.g., '.json', '.txt')

Description:

Constructs the full file path for a cache entry

Returns:

Complete file path for the cache entry

Example:
const cache = new Cache('./cache');
const filename = cache.getFilename('user-123', '.json');
console.log(filename); // './cache/user-123.json'

content.text: Checks if a cache entry exists on disk
True if cache entry exists and caching is enabled, false otherwise

text.comment: Cache key identifier
File extension

Description:

Checks if a cache entry exists on disk

Returns:

True if cache entry exists and caching is enabled, false otherwise

Example:
const cache = new Cache('./cache');
cache.enable();

if (cache.has('expensive-calculation', '.json')) {
  console.log('Using cached result');
  return cache.get('expensive-calculation', '.json');
} else {
  console.log('Computing new result');
  const result = performExpensiveCalculation();
  cache.write('expensive-calculation', '.json', result);
  return result;
}

content.text: Wraps multiple methods of a class with caching functionality

text.comment: The class constructor to modify

summary.text: Map of method names to identity functions

text.comment: Map of method names to identity functions

Description:

Wraps multiple methods of a class with caching functionality

Example:
class DataProcessor {
  async processLargeDataset(datasetId) {
    // Expensive data processing
    return await heavyProcessing(datasetId);
  }

  calculateStatistics(data) {
    // Expensive sync calculation
    return computeStats(data);
  }
}

const cache = new Cache('./processing-cache');
cache.wrap(DataProcessor, {
  processLargeDataset: (id) => ({ key: `dataset-${id}`, ext: '.json' }),
  calculateStatistics: (data) => ({ key: `stats-${data.hash}`, ext: '.json' })
});

// Now all instances use caching automatically
const processor = new DataProcessor();
const result = await processor.processLargeDataset('dataset-1'); // Cached

content.text: Wraps an async function with caching functionality
Wrapped function that checks cache before calling original

summary.text: The original async function to wrap

text.comment: The original async function to wrap

summary.text: Function that generates cache key and extension from arguments

text.comment: Function that generates cache key and extension from arguments

Description:

Wraps an async function with caching functionality

Returns:

Wrapped function that checks cache before calling original

Example:
// Wrap an expensive async operation
async function fetchUserData(userId) {
  const response = await fetch(`/api/users/${userId}`);
  return response.json();
}

const cachedFetch = cache.wrapAsync(
  fetchUserData,
  (userId) => ({ key: `user-${userId}`, ext: '.json' })
);

// First call hits API, subsequent calls use cache
const user1 = await cachedFetch(123); // API call
const user2 = await cachedFetch(123); // Cache hit

content.text: Wraps a synchronous function with caching functionality
Wrapped function that checks cache before calling original

summary.text: The original sync function to wrap

text.comment: The original sync function to wrap

summary.text: Function that generates cache key and extension from arguments

text.comment: Function that generates cache key and extension from arguments

Description:

Wraps a synchronous function with caching functionality

Returns:

Wrapped function that checks cache before calling original

Example:
// Wrap an expensive sync computation
function calculatePrimes(limit) {
  // Expensive prime calculation
  const primes = [];
  for (let i = 2; i <= limit; i++) {
    if (isPrime(i)) primes.push(i);
  }
  return primes;
}

const cachedCalculation = cache.wrapNormal(
  calculatePrimes,
  (limit) => ({ key: `primes-${limit}`, ext: '.json' })
);

// First call computes, subsequent calls use cache
const primes1 = cachedCalculation(1000); // Computation
const primes2 = cachedCalculation(1000); // Cache hit

content.text: Writes data to cache on disk
Promise that resolves when the cache write completes

text.comment: Cache key identifier

summary.text: File extension ('.json' for JSON serialization, others as text)

text.comment: File extension ('.json' for JSON serialization, others as text)

summary.text: Content to cache (objects for .json, strings for others)

text.comment: Content to cache (objects for .json, strings for others)

Description:

Writes data to cache on disk

Returns:

Promise that resolves when the cache write completes

Example:
// Cache JSON data
const userData = { id: 123, name: 'John', preferences: { theme: 'dark' } };
cache.write('user-123', '.json', userData);
Example:
// Cache text data
const htmlContent = '<html><body>Hello World</body></html>';
cache.write('page-home', '.html', htmlContent);
Example:
// Cache API response
const apiResponse = await fetch('/api/data').then(r => r.json());
cache.write(`api-data-${Date.now()}`, '.json', apiResponse);

Description:

基于文件的缓存系统，支持同步和异步操作。File-based caching system that supports both synchronous and asynchronous operations with automatic method wrapping and persistent storage.

Example:
// Basic cache usage
const cache = new Cache('./cache-dir');
cache.enable();

// Store and retrieve data
cache.write('user-123', '.json', { name: 'John', age: 30 });
const userData = cache.get('user-123', '.json');
console.log(userData); // { name: 'John', age: 30 }
Example:
// Method wrapping for automatic caching
class ApiClient {
  async fetchUser(id) {
    // Expensive API call
    return await fetch(`/api/users/${id}`).then(r => r.json());
  }
}

const cache = new Cache('./api-cache');
cache.enable();
cache.wrap(ApiClient, {
  fetchUser: (id) => ({ key: `user-${id}`, ext: '.json' })
});
Example:
// Performance optimization for expensive calculations
class MathProcessor {
  calculatePrimes(limit) {
    // Expensive prime calculation
    const primes = [];
    for (let i = 2; i <= limit; i++) {
      if (this.isPrime(i)) primes.push(i);
    }
    return primes;
  }
}

const cache = new Cache('./math-cache');
cache.enable();
cache.wrap(MathProcessor, {
  calculatePrimes: (limit) => ({ key: `primes-${limit}`, ext: '.json' })
});
